name: Sugar Cookie Wreaths
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Combine cookie mix, contents of buttery flavor packet from Mix and egg in a large bowl. Stir until thoroughly blended.
2. Tint dough with green food coloring. Stir until desired color. Form into balls the size of miniature marshmallows. For each wreath, arrange 9 or 10 balls with sides touching into a ring, 2 inches apart, on ungreased baking sheets. Flatten slightly with fingers. Place small piece of candied cherry on each ball.
3. Bake at 375°F for 5-7 minutes or until set but not browned. Cool 1 minute on baking sheets. Remove to cooling racks. Cool completely. Store in airtight container.
Makes 2 dozen cookies.
